text:

configure log

config log says:

configure:13943: cc -o conftest -O2 -pipe -pg -g  -Wno-error -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing -Wall -Wno-unused-function -D_BSD_SOURCE -DINET6=1   -fstack-protector conftest.c -llzma   >&5

configure:13943: $? = 1
